message:
test(fuzz): verify_epoch_zone_key + derive_zone_key_for_epoch (r8i9b)

Add fuzz_verify_epoch_zone_key covering the PCS forward-secrecy
verification primitives (pcs.rs:230, pcs.rs:572). Existing pcs_group_state
fuzz exercises the group state machine but never the standalone
verify_epoch_zone_key path. Properties: derive determinism, round-trip
yields Ok(true), wrong-secret bit-flip → Ok(false), wrong-epoch →
Ok(false), wrong-zone → Ok(false), bit-flipped expected_key →
Ok(false), cross-zone keys distinct at the same (secret, epoch).
Once-gated anchors verify each rejection branch on hand-picked inputs
(zone z:work + secret [0x42;32] + epoch 7).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
